calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 30, 2015, in Department 525:
Mackil Taylor, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness/social worker Lamar Seymore.
Bruce Burge - property manager appearing for Appellant/Defendant BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Mr. Seymore testifies on behalf of Mackil Taylor and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - copies of electronic phone bills (returned).

Mr. Burge testifies on behalf of Baldwin House Hotel and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit not marked - agreement, Google price list of IPhone.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence of defendant/appellant retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David May; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Continued To Aug-04-15 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Continued To Jul-17-15 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
